description: Style NoteWith this Climalite enabled performance T-shirt, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of performance fabrics keeps cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, meaning you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On a day off, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsTeal blue T-shirt that has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves, branding on the left sleeve, stitch detailing and graphic print on the frontMaterial and Care60% cotton and 40% polyesterMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
